_comment: Curated sources for the weekly auto-updater. `feeds` are RSS/Atom endpoints the GitHub Action parses each week (verified live, no login, no Cloudflare bot-block). `watch` are high-value sources that CANNOT be auto-scraped (login-walled social, or Cloudflare-protected) so they render as a static 'check these yourself' link list. If a weekly run reports a feed dead, move it to watch; promote any watch source that later exposes a working feed.

feeds.name: The HK HUB
feeds.note: Weekly 'What's On Families' kids/events roundups plus general HK events.

feeds.name: Time Out Hong Kong
feeds.note: Things to do this weekend, exhibitions, family attractions.

feeds.name: Oh!Pama (Oh!爸媽)
feeds.note: Schooling/parenting portal: kindergarten and admission news, family activities.

watch.name: Sassy Mama — What's On
watch.why: Best EN kids what's-on; Cloudflare blocks bots, read directly.

watch.name: HK Kindergarten — Admission Calendar
watch.why: KG open days and admission dates calendar; bot-blocked.

watch.name: GetSetParents — Interview Dates
watch.why: Running list of direct/private school application and interview dates.

watch.name: HK01 親子 — 幼稚園入學
watch.why: Continuously-updated K1/N-class admission timetables and open days.

watch.name: ParentsDaily — 重要日期一覽表
watch.why: Kindergarten key-dates tables per school year.

watch.name: IG/Threads @littlestepsasia
watch.why: Weekly parenting guide; login-walled, follow directly.

watch.name: Xiaohongshu — search 香港親子好去處
watch.why: Real-parent activity tips and venue reviews; login-walled.
